summary: Frontend testing completed for KdM (Klip de Moment) - Wallet Modal, Gift System UI, Font Styling, Modal Centering, and GlassDropdown. Fixed missing font-display classes on DiscoverPage headings.

backend_issues.note: Backend testing skipped as per request - already tested via curl

fixed_during_testing.fix: Added font-display class to H1 on line 159
Added font-display class to H2 on line 168
Added font-display class to H2 on line 229

wallet_modal.modal_opens_centered: ✓ Modal opens centered with glassmorphism effect
wallet_modal.balance_tab: ✓ Shows Sold Total, Câștigat Total, Cheltuit Total, Istoric Tranzacții
wallet_modal.topup_tab: ✓ Shows conversion rate (1 coin = 0.013 EUR with 30% platform fee), Viva Payments button
wallet_modal.withdraw_tab: ✓ Shows conversion rate (1 coin = 0.01 EUR), minimum 100 coins, available balance

gift_flying_animations.animation_properties: ✓ Scale, rotate, glow, sparkles, fade animations defined
gift_flying_animations.trigger_mechanism: ✓ sendGift function triggers animation via flyingGifts state (lines 271-289)

ui_polishing.font_display_h1_h2: ✓ Applied on LivePage H1, ProfilePage H1, DiscoverPage (after fix)
ui_polishing.font_body_text: ✓ Applied on body text across pages
ui_polishing.text_shadow_video_overlays: ✓ drop-shadow styling found on video overlay text in FeedPage

glass_dropdown.categories: ✓ Shows Gaming, Muzică, Talk Show, Gătit, Sport, Artă, Educație, Tech, Lifestyle, Altele

critical_code_review_comments: Gift flying animation cannot be visually verified without an active live stream with real gift sending - component code looks correct
Live stream viewer has header overlay intercepting clicks on Gifts tab - may need z-index adjustment
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: Wallet Modal (3 tabs working), Gift animations (code verified), Font styling (fixed missing classes), Modal centering (all modals centered), GlassDropdown (working in GoLiveStudio). Live stream viewer works but Gifts tab click is intercepted by header overlay.
